pwa_extraction.description: Extracts PWA details (short name, icons) from target URL to configure compiling of Nintendo Switch wrapper.

profile_selector.description: Invokes Nintendo Switch User Selector applet to select user account profile for persistent data.

web_applet_launch.description: Creates and starts NetFront NX WebKit applet loading configured target URL with associated account UID cookie storage.

github_ota_update.description: Queries GitHub Release API on start, compares release versions, downloads and saves latest NRO asset dynamically onto SD card.

ci_cd_build_release.description: Automated workflow compile pipeline generating localized NRO application bundle and posting a release tag on GitHub.

ci_validation_linting.description: Automatic linting (Ruff, cppcheck) and unit testing (pytest) pipeline triggered on push/pull requests.

governance_and_labeling.description: Automatic welcome remarks, manufacturer disclaimers, and file-path labeling configurations for PRs/Issues.
